support.title: Need help?
support.description: Send your request through our Google Form for updates, approvals, or guidance.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Jodohmu was born from the belief that every Muslim deserves to find a life partner in a dignified way. We are a trusted offline ta'aruf partner—not an algorithm, but real people who genuinely care about your journey toward a blessed marriage.

hero.title: Offline Marriage Matchmaking & Ta'aruf in Indonesia
hero.description: Jodohmu guides serious, marriage-intent singles with offline, faith-aligned matchmaking, ta'aruf facilitation, and family-friendly vetting across Indonesia.
hero.tagline: Halal, offline introductions for sincere hearts ready for marriage.
hero.statsSubtitle: Our concierge team has nurtured hundreds of meaningful introductions grounded in love, trust, and faith.
hero.statsFooter: Every match is personally reviewed by our matchmakers.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Jodohmu?
whyChoose.description: We are more than an app. We are your offline, faith-aligned marriage matchmaking team for serious ta'aruf seekers.
whyChoose.secondary: Every introduction is curated with care, intention, and deep respect for your values—guided by matchmakers who understand halal courtship.

trust.title: Serious, Vetted Community
trust.description: Every member is screened and guided by our team so you can invest your heart with confidence.

guidance.title: Personal Matchmakers
guidance.description: Dedicated advisors walk with you—from first conversation to the moment a proposal feels right.

curation.title: Purposeful Introductions
curation.description: Thoughtful matches focus on compatibility, shared faith, and long-term vision for a blessed marriage.

features.title: Concierge matchmaking crafted around you
features.subtitle: Handpicked offline introductions for serious, marriage-ready singles—ta'aruf guidance, family involvement, and respectful venues across Indonesia.
features.storyDescription: A private concierge experience crafted for meaningful introductions
features.storyNote: Think of us as your trusted confidants. We listen, advise, and orchestrate introductions with sincerity and respect for your intentions.
features.storyFootnote: Dedicated matchmakers follow up after every introduction.

curated.title: Thoughtful matches shaped around your values
curated.subtitle: We pair your story with hearts that share the same faith, family vision, and pace.

trusted.title: Real people, verified intentions
trusted.subtitle: Every profile is screened and welcomed personally by our concierge team.

celebrated.title: Stories that blossom into forever
celebrated.subtitle: From first salaam to engagement, we stand beside couples at every milestone.

personalized.title: Personalized Matching
personalized.description: Our dedicated team gets to know you, your values, and your aspirations to find matches that truly resonate with your heart.

community.title: Serious Community
community.description: Join a private, vetted community of individuals who are genuinely ready for a meaningful, long-term commitment.

guided.title: Guided Meetings
guided.description: We facilitate meetings in a way that is comfortable, respectful, and true to your faith.

halal.title: Halal & Supervised
halal.description: All interactions are designed to be respectful, with options for supervised meetings.

philosophy.heading: More Than an App, We're Your Partners
philosophy.description: Finding a life partner is one of the most important journeys you'll ever take. At Jodohmu, we don't leave it to chance. Our matchmakers work with you like a dedicated team, providing guidance, support, and a human touch that algorithms can't replicate.

meetings.title: Meetings with Intention
meetings.description: Your comfort and safety are our top priorities. We arrange meetings in a controlled, respectful environment—be it our office or a trusted public space—often with the presence of an imam or family members, ensuring every interaction is dignified and purposeful.
meetings.secondary: Every introduction is coordinated by our team, with regular check-ins to keep feelings, expectations, and next steps aligned for both families.

promises.safe: Private lounges, respectful venues, and the option for chaperones with every meeting.
promises.transparent: Clear expectations, guided conversations, and structured follow-up so no moment feels uncertain.
promises.family: Family members and spiritual advisors can be involved at every stage to keep the process anchored in faith.

intake.title: Intentional Intake
intake.description: We learn your story, faith priorities, and comfort level to design meetings that feel safe and tailored to you.

curated.title: Curated Introductions
curated.description: Our matchmakers coordinate respectful encounters with candidates who share your values and long-term vision.

checkins.title: Compassionate Check-ins
checkins.description: After each meeting we listen, support, and guide next steps so you always feel confident moving forward.

whatsappCta.caption: Want personal guidance? Fill out our Google Form and our team will follow up.
whatsappCta.prefill: Hello JodohMu, I'd love to consult with your team.

testimonials.title: From Our Community
testimonials.subtitle: Two friendly humans who guide you through Jodohmu—no endless testimonials, just real help.

miraGuide.quote: Hi, I’m Mira—your calm match guide. I’ll walk you through how Jodohmu works, explain the halal/offline flow, and earn your trust step by step.
miraGuide.name: Mira • Match Guide

bimaAssistant.quote: I’m Bima—your personal marriage assistant. I’ll shortlist matches, schedule supervised meetings, and stay with you until you’re ready to say yes.
bimaAssistant.name: Bima • Marriage Assistant

cta.title: Ready to Find 'The One'?
cta.description: Your search for a meaningful, lasting partnership starts here. Let us be your guide on the beautiful journey to marriage.

features.security: Your data stays private and protected

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: Your privacy matters to us. We're committed to protecting your personal information with care, faith, and sincerity.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.body: Welcome to Jodohmu. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our services.

items.profile: Profile information including photos, bio, and preferences

items.interactions: How you interact with our platform

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.description: We use your personal information to:

items.service: Provide and maintain our matchmaking service
items.safety: Ensure platform safety and prevent fraud
items.improvements: Improve our services and user experience

sharing.title: Data Sharing & Third Parties
sharing.description: We may share your information with trusted partners to help operate and protect our platform:

firebase.title: Firebase/Google
firebase.description: Our database and authentication services are hosted on Firebase. Google acts as our data processor and stores information on our behalf.

providers.title: Service Providers
providers.description: Verified third-party partners who assist with infrastructure, analytics, and customer support

legal.title: Legal Authorities
legal.description: When required by law or to protect our rights, safety, or other users

sharing.note: We never sell your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.

security.title: How We Protect Your Data
security.description: We implement technical and organizational measures to secure your personal data, including:

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.description: Subject to applicable law, you have the right to:

items.access: Access the personal data we hold about you
items.delete: Request deletion of your account and data
items.object: Object to or restrict certain processing
items.portability: Request a copy of your data in a portable format
items.withdraw: Withdraw consent where processing is based on consent

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.description: We retain your personal data only as long as necessary to provide our services and meet legal obligations. When you delete your account, we remove profile information within 30 days unless we must retain it for legal reasons.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.description: Jodohmu is intended for users 18 years and older. We do not knowingly collect information from minors and will delete any such data immediately if discovered.

international.title: International Data Transfers
international.description: Your information may be processed outside Indonesia. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place to protect your data in accordance with applicable laws.

updates.title: Updates to This Policy
updates.description: We may update this policy from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated via email or in-app notifications, and the updated policy will always be available here.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have questions about this policy or your data, reach out to us:

hero.title: Terms and Conditions
hero.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully. By using Jodohmu, you agree to honor these commitments rooted in respect, safety, and sincerity.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By accessing and using Jodohmu, you agree to be bound by these terms and any additional guidelines we provide. If you cannot agree, please refrain from using our services.

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.body: You must be at least 18 years old and capable of entering into a binding agreement to create an account. By registering, you confirm that you meet these requirements.

important.label: Important:
important.body: Providing false age information is a violation of these terms and may result in immediate account termination and possible legal action.

registration.title: Registration Requirements
registration.body: Provide accurate and complete information when creating your account. Keep your profile details up to date so we can offer the best experience.

items.responsibility: You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account.
items.notify: Notify us immediately if you suspect unauthorized access or misuse.
items.liability: We are not liable for losses arising from unauthorized access caused by your actions.
items.sharing: Do not share your login credentials with anyone.

conduct.title: User Conduct & Prohibited Activities
conduct.description: Help us nurture a respectful community by following these guidelines and avoiding prohibited activity.

items.falseInfo: Posting false, misleading, or deceptive information.
items.inappropriate: Uploading offensive, obscene, or unlawful content.
items.explicit: Sharing explicit or sexually suggestive material.

items.harassment: Harassing, bullying, or threatening other users.
items.spam: Spamming or sending unsolicited commercial messages.
items.personalInfo: Attempting to obtain personal information from other users.
items.illegal: Engaging in or encouraging illegal activities.

items.photos: Use recent photos that clearly represent you.
items.bio: Ensure your bio and details are honest and accurate.
items.contactInfo: Do not share contact information publicly.
items.promotions: Avoid watermarks, advertisements, or promotional content.

removal.title: Content Removal
removal.body: We reserve the right to remove any content violating these guidelines without prior notice. Repeated violations may result in suspension or account closure.

your.title: Your Content
your.body: You retain ownership of the content you submit. By posting, you grant us a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to display and distribute your content to operate the service.

platform.title: Platform Content
platform.body: All Jodohmu trademarks, designs, and technology are protected by law. Do not use them without written permission.

guarantees.title: No Guarantees
guarantees.body: Jodohmu does not guarantee that you will find a match, relationship, or life partner through the service.

safety.title: Meeting Safety
safety.body: You are responsible for your safety during in-person meetings. Meet in public places and inform someone you trust of your plans.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Jodohmu is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from your use of our services.

voluntary.title: Voluntary Termination
voluntary.body: You may delete your account at any time through your settings. We will remove your profile within 30 days, consistent with our Privacy Policy.

byJodohmu.title: Termination by Jodohmu
byJodohmu.body: We may suspend or terminate your account immediately for violations of these terms, illegal activity, or actions that put our community at risk.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.description: We may modify these terms at any time. Updated terms will be posted here with the revised date noted above.
changes.notification: For significant updates, we will notify you via email or in-app messaging. Continuing to use Jodohmu after changes means you accept the new terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Your use of Jodohmu is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Review how we collect and protect your data at

governing.title: Governing Law
governing.body: These terms are governed by the laws of Indonesia without regard to conflict-of-law principles.

dispute.title: Dispute Resolution
dispute.body: Disputes will first be addressed through good-faith negotiations. If unresolved, they will be submitted to arbitration in Bandung, Indonesia.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Questions about these terms? We're here to help:

hero.tagline: Find your soulmate with care, faith, and sincerity.
hero.description: Join thousands of hearts who trust JodohMu to nurture meaningful introductions grounded in shared values and purposeful intentions.

connect.title: Connect With Us
connect.description: Stay close to the JodohMu community and never miss heartfelt success stories, events, and tips curated for your journey.

stepByStepProcess.metaTitle: Offline ta'aruf step-by-step | How Jodohmu guides you to marriage
stepByStepProcess.metaDescription: From intake to proposal: curated candidates, pre-call, vetted meetings, facilitators, and transparent follow-ups—offline and marriage-focused.
stepByStepProcess.ogDescription: See how Jodohmu guides you: intake, vetting, scheduling, facilitated meetings, and clear next steps toward marriage.
stepByStepProcess.title: Our step-by-step offline ta'aruf process
stepByStepProcess.subtitle: From intake to proposal readiness: every step is structured, supervised, and transparent so you move confidently toward marriage.
stepByStepProcess.heroLead: Curated candidates, calm venues, facilitators on request, and clear follow-ups—so you focus on deciding.
stepByStepProcess.flowIntro: A concise view of how we move you from intake to commitment with offline, supervised meetings.
points: Curated candidates only: intent to marry, values fit, and readiness screened upfront.
Calm, neutral venues: hotel lounges/private rooms for focused, respectful talk.
Facilitators available: imam/pastor/family chaperone to guide the flow.
Structured decisions: clear follow-ups so you don't stall or guess.
steps: Intake call: understand your intent, boundaries, faith considerations, and family expectations.
Profile & screening: verify seriousness, values alignment, and readiness to meet.
Shortlist & confirm: you approve who to meet; we lock schedule and venue.
Facilitated meeting: chaperoned or with requested imam/pastor; clear agenda for faith, family, and future.
Reflection & follow-up: structured debrief, clarity on interest, and boundary-respecting communication.
Next steps & fees: transparent packages for additional meetings or proposal guidance—no surprises.
stepByStepProcess.scenario: Picture a neat timeline: discovery on Monday, vetted shortlist midweek, a calm hotel lounge meeting on Saturday with facilitator present, and by Monday you have a clear yes/no and next steps with costs disclosed.
whatWeHandle: Screening & verification: intent to marry, background basics, and family readiness signals.
Scheduling & venues: respectful, neutral spaces booked for you.
Facilitation: imam/pastor or trusted chaperone on request to keep the flow on track.
Decision support: structured debriefs and guidance to proceed or exit gracefully.

benefits.title: Momentum without chaos
benefits.desc: Every step is timed; you always know what happens next.

benefits.title: Respectful and faith-aware
benefits.desc: Facilitators/chaperones keep adab and faith needs honored.

benefits.title: Transparent costs
benefits.desc: Packages are laid out before you move to next sessions or proposal.

stepByStepProcess.facilitationBody: We set a calm venue, brief the facilitator, align questions on faith, values, and family. You arrive knowing the flow, timebox, and who guides it.
stepByStepProcess.pricingBody: Intake is free. Meetings and facilitation are packaged; you see fees before committing to the next milestone.
stepByStepProcess.ctaBody: Ready for a structured path? Ask for the latest packages and facilitator options (imam/pastor/chaperone).

points: Limited social circles mean fewer options.

Candidate curation: our team selects from a verified database.

Scheduling meetings at safe, comfortable venues.
A professional facilitator present at every ta'aruf.
Written follow-up so nothing is left unclear.

perjodohanHalalVsDatingApp.title: Halal matchmaking vs dating apps: which is more effective?
perjodohanHalalVsDatingApp.subtitle: An honest comparison between offline halal matchmaking and dating apps for Muslim singles serious about marriage.
perjodohanHalalVsDatingApp.heroLead: Dating apps promise convenience, but how many actually end at the altar? We compare facts, not promises.
perjodohanHalalVsDatingApp.whyTitle: Why dating apps aren't ideal for serious marriage seekers
perjodohanHalalVsDatingApp.flowIntro: A process designed for marriage, not just introductions.
points: Dating apps prioritize appearance—not marriage readiness.
Endless chatting rarely leads to real commitment.
Fake profiles and catfishing waste precious time.
No family involvement means objections surface later.
steps: Intent screening: Jodohmu ensures all candidates are marriage-ready.
Identity verification: ID, employment, and references are checked.
Manual curation: the team selects based on value compatibility, not algorithms.
Chaperoned meetings: offline ta'aruf with a facilitator.
Joint decision: structured evaluation, not ghosting.
perjodohanHalalVsDatingApp.scenario: On a dating app, you swipe 200 profiles and chat with 20 people over 3 months—result: nothing. At Jodohmu, you meet 2-3 verified candidates in a month, all facilitated and serious about marriage.
whatWeHandle: All candidates have verified marriage intent and identity.
Meetings always include a facilitator or chaperone.
Family can be involved from the start without awkwardness.
A transparent process with a clear timeline.
perjodohanHalalVsDatingApp.benefitsTitle: Facts: halal matchmaking vs dating apps

benefits.title: Verified intent
benefits.desc: 100% of Jodohmu candidates are interviewed and confirmed marriage-ready. On dating apps? No guarantees.

benefits.title: Real meetings
benefits.desc: Offline ta'aruf with a chaperone, not endless chats that go nowhere.

benefits.title: Family aligned
benefits.desc: Parents can be involved from the start—something impossible on dating apps.

perjodohanHalalVsDatingApp.facilitationBody: Every meeting has boundaries: a chaperone present, a respectful venue, a structured agenda. No unsupervised one-on-one meetings.
perjodohanHalalVsDatingApp.pricingBody: How much does 6 months on a premium dating app cost? For a similar budget, you get verified candidates and a facilitated process at Jodohmu.
perjodohanHalalVsDatingApp.ctaBody: Leave dating apps behind. Register at Jodohmu and meet verified candidates this week.

tipsTaarufPertama.title: First ta'aruf tips: complete preparation guide
tipsTaarufPertama.subtitle: Nervous about your first ta'aruf? A practical guide from Jodohmu to make your first meeting memorable, respectful, and productive.
tipsTaarufPertama.heroLead: Your first ta'aruf can be nerve-wracking. But with the right preparation, you can show up confident and make a great impression.
tipsTaarufPertama.flowIntro: 5 preparation steps for a smooth ta'aruf.
points: An unprepared ta'aruf often ends up awkward.
Wrong questions can leave a bad impression.
Inappropriate attire reduces confidence.
Without an agenda, meetings are often unproductive.
steps: Set your intention: come with a sincere desire to find a life partner.
Prepare questions: family vision, husband-wife roles, finances, worship.
Choose neat, modest clothing: clean, appropriate, and fitting the occasion.
Arrive on time: show you respect their time.
Maintain adab: listen more, don't dominate the conversation.
tipsTaarufPertama.scenario: Imagine: you arrive 10 minutes early, neatly dressed, and the facilitator greets you. The introduction begins, you ask about family vision, and your counterpart is impressed by your readiness. 45 minutes pass, and you leave with clarity—not confusion.
tipsTaarufPertama.whatWeHandleTitle: How Jodohmu helps with your first ta'aruf
whatWeHandle: Pre-meeting brief: we share a short profile of your counterpart.
The facilitator opens the conversation so it's not awkward.
A structured agenda ensures all important topics are covered.
Written follow-up after the meeting for easier decision-making.

benefits.title: More confident
benefits.desc: You know what to expect and what to ask.

benefits.title: Great first impression
benefits.desc: Neat appearance and calm demeanor make you more attractive.

benefits.title: Faster decisions
benefits.desc: A productive meeting yields clarity, not confusion.

tipsTaarufPertama.facilitationBody: Jodohmu's facilitators aren't stern supervisors. They're there to open conversation, set the pace, and ensure both parties are comfortable. Think of them as an MC keeping the event running smoothly.
tipsTaarufPertama.pricingTitle: Facilitated ta'aruf included in every package
tipsTaarufPertama.pricingBody: Every Jodohmu package includes at least 1 facilitated ta'aruf meeting. No extra charge for the facilitator.
tipsTaarufPertama.ctaBody: Register at Jodohmu and we'll prepare everything—from candidates to venues.

doesJodohmuGuaranteeMatch.metaTitle: Does Jodohmu Guarantee a Match? | Honest Expectations
doesJodohmuGuaranteeMatch.metaDescription: What Jodohmu actually commits to — and what no matchmaker in the world can promise. An honest answer to the question every serious client asks.
doesJodohmuGuaranteeMatch.ogDescription: An honest, warm answer to the question every serious client asks before signing up.
doesJodohmuGuaranteeMatch.title: Does Jodohmu Guarantee a Match?
doesJodohmuGuaranteeMatch.subtitle: The honest answer — and why our honesty is exactly what makes us trustworthy.
doesJodohmuGuaranteeMatch.heroLead: Every serious client asks this before they pay. Here's our complete, honest answer — no sugarcoating, no false promises.
doesJodohmuGuaranteeMatch.flowTitle: The three outcomes clients worry about
doesJodohmuGuaranteeMatch.flowIntro: And how we handle each one with care and honesty.
points: A rigorous, human-guided process — not an algorithm.
Verified candidates who are serious about marriage.
A facilitator present at every introduction.
Honest communication with you throughout your journey.
steps: No match found within your window — We keep searching and communicating openly. We'd rather offer an extension than go quiet on you.
Rejected by a candidate you liked — This is not our failure, or yours. Compatibility is between two people. We introduce; we don't force.
You don't find anyone suitable — We'll be honest if your expectations need revisiting. Honest feedback is part of the service.
Your package window expires — Every service is delivered within your window. We give our full effort from day one.
You feel uncertain at any point — Our door is always open. Talk to us — we'd rather hear your concern early.
doesJodohmuGuaranteeMatch.scenario: Think of us like a trusted family friend who knows many people — we make the best introduction we can with genuine care. But whether two hearts connect is not ours to decide. That part belongs to you, and to something greater than us.
whatWeHandle: Fake profiles — every candidate is ID-verified before you ever see their name.
Time-wasters — our intake filters for serious intent, not curiosity.
Unsafe meetings — a facilitator is present at every introduction.
Silence — you receive regular updates and honest feedback throughout your journey.

benefits.title: Quality of introductions
benefits.desc: Every candidate we present is verified, serious, and genuinely suited to what you're looking for.

benefits.title: Honesty throughout
benefits.desc: We tell you the truth — even when it's not what you want to hear. That honesty is what protects your time and your heart.

benefits.title: Care in every step
benefits.desc: From your intake interview to your final meeting, you are treated with full respect and seriousness.

doesJodohmuGuaranteeMatch.facilitationTitle: A note on marriage and effort
doesJodohmuGuaranteeMatch.facilitationBody: Marriage is ultimately between two people and shaped by forces beyond any matchmaker's control. Our responsibility — and yours — is to give this process our sincere best effort. Jodohmu is that effort, made structured and serious. What we promise is not an outcome. We promise dedication.
doesJodohmuGuaranteeMatch.pricingTitle: One important acknowledgement before you begin
doesJodohmuGuaranteeMatch.pricingBody: Every client confirms before payment: Jodohmu provides a professional matchmaking and facilitation service. We do not guarantee a match, engagement, or marriage. We commit to delivering our full process with care, honesty, and seriousness.
doesJodohmuGuaranteeMatch.ctaTitle: If you're serious about finding the right person the right way
doesJodohmuGuaranteeMatch.ctaBody: We'd love to talk. Reach out on WhatsApp — no pressure, no rush. Just an honest conversation about what you're looking for.

whatMakesTaarufDifferent.metaTitle: What Makes Ta'aruf Different From Dating? | Jodohmu
whatMakesTaarufDifferent.metaDescription: Ta'aruf isn't dating with rules. It's a completely different approach to meeting a potential spouse — structured, purposeful, and dignified. Here's how it works.
whatMakesTaarufDifferent.ogTitle: What Makes Ta'aruf Different From Dating?
whatMakesTaarufDifferent.ogDescription: Ta'aruf and dating look similar from the outside. Inside, they're completely different — and that difference matters.
whatMakesTaarufDifferent.title: What Makes a Ta'aruf Different From Dating?
whatMakesTaarufDifferent.subtitle: It's not dating with more rules. It's a fundamentally different way of meeting a life partner — purposeful from the very first conversation.
whatMakesTaarufDifferent.heroLead: If you've heard the word ta'aruf but aren't quite sure what it means — or how it's different from regular dating — this is for you.
whatMakesTaarufDifferent.flowTitle: How a ta'aruf works at Jodohmu
whatMakesTaarufDifferent.flowIntro: Step by step — from first introduction to a clear decision.
points: Dating is open-ended. Ta'aruf begins with a clear intention — marriage.
Dating is private. Ta'aruf involves family and a neutral facilitator.
Dating has no structure or timeline. Ta'aruf has a defined process with clear next steps.
Dating often leads to emotional entanglement before serious decisions. Ta'aruf protects both hearts by keeping things structured until there is real commitment.
steps: Intake & profile building — we get to know you properly before any introduction is made.
Candidate matching — you're presented with verified profiles suited to your values and goals.
First facilitated session — a structured conversation with a facilitator present. Family may join.
Follow-up sessions — further conversations if both parties wish to continue. Always supervised.
Decision — a clear yes or no, with no pressure and full respect for both sides.
whatMakesTaarufDifferent.scenario: In a typical dating scenario, two people meet, chat for months, develop feelings, and then discover they want completely different things. In ta'aruf, the important questions come first — so no one wastes their time or their heart.
whatWeHandle: Every candidate is verified before introduction — no fake profiles, no wasted meetings.
A facilitator is present at every session — keeping things respectful and purposeful.
Family involvement is welcomed and structured — not awkward or forced.
You always know where you stand — we give honest feedback after every session.

benefits.title: Clarity from day one
benefits.desc: Everyone in the process is here for marriage. There is no ambiguity about intentions.

benefits.title: Protection for your heart
benefits.desc: Structured introductions mean you don't invest emotionally before knowing if someone is genuinely compatible.

benefits.title: Open to all serious clients
benefits.desc: You don't need to be Muslim to value this process. If you respect sincerity, family, and dignity — ta'aruf is for you.

whatMakesTaarufDifferent.facilitationTitle: Not just for one culture or religion
whatMakesTaarufDifferent.facilitationBody: Ta'aruf is rooted in Islamic tradition, but its values — purpose, dignity, family involvement, honest communication — resonate far beyond any single religion. Anyone who wants to find a partner seriously and respectfully will feel at home in this process.
whatMakesTaarufDifferent.pricingTitle: What's included in every Jodohmu package
whatMakesTaarufDifferent.pricingBody: Every package includes facilitated introduction sessions, a dedicated facilitator, and verified candidate profiles. No hidden costs — you know exactly what you're investing in before you begin.
whatMakesTaarufDifferent.ctaBody: If this way of finding a partner resonates with you, we'd love to welcome you. Message us on WhatsApp and let's have a conversation.

howWeVerifyEveryCandidate.metaTitle: How We Verify Every Candidate Before You Meet Them | Jodohmu
howWeVerifyEveryCandidate.metaDescription: No fake profiles. No hidden pasts. Every candidate on Jodohmu is personally screened, ID-verified, and vetted for serious intent before any introduction is made.
howWeVerifyEveryCandidate.ogTitle: How We Verify Every Candidate Before You Meet Them
howWeVerifyEveryCandidate.ogDescription: Our full verification process — what we check, why we check it, and how it protects you.
howWeVerifyEveryCandidate.title: How We Verify Every Candidate Before You Meet Them
howWeVerifyEveryCandidate.subtitle: No fake profiles. No guessing. Every person you're introduced to has been personally assessed by our team.
howWeVerifyEveryCandidate.heroLead: The fear of being matched with someone dishonest is real. Here's exactly what we do to make sure that never happens.
howWeVerifyEveryCandidate.flowTitle: Our verification process — step by step
howWeVerifyEveryCandidate.flowIntro: What we check before any introduction is ever made.
points: Fake profiles are common on apps — we have zero tolerance for them.
Serious intent cannot be assumed — we screen for it explicitly.
A background without verification is just a story — we cross-check facts.
Your time and heart deserve protection — that is why we verify before you meet, not after.
steps: ID verification — government-issued ID is confirmed before the profile is ever activated.
Employment & social media check — we cross-reference what candidates tell us against what we can verify.
Video call assessment — a member of our team speaks with every candidate directly. We read people, not just forms.
Psychology assessment — included for Ruby and Diamond package clients.
Intent check — we ask directly about readiness, expectations, and family situation. Unclear or dishonest answers disqualify.
howWeVerifyEveryCandidate.scenario: When you receive a candidate profile from us, you are not looking at a stranger's self-reported bio. You are looking at a profile our team has verified, spoken with, and assessed as genuine and serious about marriage.
whatWeHandle: Identity — confirmed by government ID, not just a profile photo.
Background — employment, family situation, and social media cross-referenced.
Intent — direct conversation about marriage readiness, not assumed from a form.
Character — assessed through a personal interview by our team, not filtered by an algorithm.

benefits.title: No fake profiles
benefits.desc: Every candidate is a real, verified person. You will never be introduced to someone our team hasn't personally assessed.

benefits.title: No time-wasters
benefits.desc: Our intake filters out the curious and the uncommitted. You only meet people who are genuinely ready for marriage.

benefits.title: Peace of mind
benefits.desc: You walk into every introduction knowing the person across from you is real, verified, and serious.

howWeVerifyEveryCandidate.facilitationBody: Verification tells us someone is real and serious. Our matching process tells us whether they're right for you. We combine both — so every introduction we make is not just safe, but meaningful.
howWeVerifyEveryCandidate.pricingBody: ID and social media verification is standard across all packages. Ruby and Diamond clients also receive workplace verification, comprehensive background checks, and clinical psychology assessments.
howWeVerifyEveryCandidate.ctaTitle: Meet someone real. Meet someone ready.
howWeVerifyEveryCandidate.ctaBody: Every person we introduce you to has been personally verified by our team. If that's the standard you're looking for, we'd love to talk.

hero.title: FAQ: Offline Marriage Matching & Ta'aruf with Jodohmu
hero.subtitle: Straight answers for sincere, marriage-focused singles across Indonesia seeking halal introductions.

items.q: How is Jodohmu different from dating apps?
items.a: We focus on offline, halal introductions, ta'aruf guidance, and family-friendly vetting for marriage-intent candidates.

items.q: Can you involve family or an imam?
items.a: Yes. We welcome parents or religious advisors and can host meetings in respectful, supervised venues.

items.q: Do you serve multiple cities in Indonesia?
items.a: We facilitate introductions across major cities and tailor matches to your region and preferences, including respectful venue recommendations.
Candidates are screened for seriousness, intent to marry, alignment with faith and values, and readiness for family involvement.

items.q: What if I'm new to ta'aruf?
items.a: Our team coaches you on etiquette, boundaries, and next steps so every meeting feels respectful and clear, with options for chaperones.
Yes. We guide you from introductions through khitbah with structured follow-ups and family alignment.
We offer transparent packages for vetted introductions and guided ta'aruf; talk to our team for the latest options.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.subtitle: Talk directly with our matchmakers for a personalized plan.

hero.title: Build something that matters.
hero.subtitle: We are growing a team of people who genuinely believe in helping Muslims find their life partner with dignity. Every role here has real impact on real people's lives.

0.title: Mission-driven work
0.text: Every client who finds their spouse through Jodohmu is a life changed. Your work here has meaning beyond a paycheck.

1.title: Performance rewarded
1.text: We believe in paying people for results. Our commission structure is transparent, fair, and designed to grow with you.

2.title: Room to grow
2.text: We are early. The people who join now will shape how this company grows — and be rewarded for it.

0.title: Appointment Setter
0.subtitle: Pencari Klien & Penjadwal Konsultasi
0.desc: You reach out to potential clients — through your network, social media, or community — and invite them to a free consultation with our team. Once they show up and qualify as a genuine lead, you earn. Simple, remote, and entirely flexible.

do.0: Reach out to potential clients via WhatsApp, Instagram, or community groups
do.1: Have warm friendly conversations to understand their interest
do.2: Book them in for a free consultation with our team
do.3: Confirm their appointment and ensure they show up

get.0: Rp 40,000 per confirmed consultation that shows up
get.1: Fully remote — work from anywhere, any time
get.4: Potential Rp 1–6 juta per month depending on effort

are.0: Friendly, warm, and trusted in your community
are.1: Active on WhatsApp or social media
are.3: Muslim, understands the value of halal matchmaking
are.4: Any location in Indonesia — fully remote

1.title: Sales Consultant
1.subtitle: Konsultan Penjualan & Penutup Klien
1.desc: You meet with potential clients — in person or via call — explain our service, understand their needs, and guide them to register. You are the bridge between a curious lead and a committed client. High commission, no cap.

do.0: Conduct free consultation meetings with warm leads
do.1: Listen deeply to understand their situation and goals
do.2: Present the right Jodohmu package for their needs
do.3: Handle objections with empathy and honesty
do.4: Guide clients to register and make their first payment

get.1: Pearl package (Rp 2,5 jt) → Rp 250–375k per close
get.2: Ruby package (Rp 5 jt) → Rp 500–750k per close
get.3: Diamond package (Rp 40 jt) → Rp 4–6 juta per close
get.4: No base salary — no ceiling on earnings

are.1: Experience in sales, counseling, or client-facing roles
are.3: Can speak with both men and women professionally
are.4: Based in Bandung or willing to meet clients there

2.title: Operations Assistant
2.subtitle: Asisten Operasional & Penanganan Klien
2.desc: This is our core team role. You handle WhatsApp communication with registered clients, assist in the matching process, manage our client database, and create daily social media content. Starting part-time — becomes full-time onsite within 3 months as the business grows.

do.0: Handle WhatsApp communication with registered clients
do.1: Assist in curating and proposing match candidates
do.2: Manage and update client database daily
do.3: Create and post social media content (scripts provided)

get.0: Rp 1.6–2 juta per month part-time to start
get.1: Full-time salary reviewed at 3 months based on performance
get.4: Be part of building something meaningful from the ground up

are.0: Muslim woman, based in Bandung — required
are.2: Comfortable with technology — WhatsApp, Instagram, Google Sheets
are.3: Functional English to communicate with founder
are.4: Understands Islamic marriage values and ta'aruf process
are.5: Ideally married — understands the journey personally
